fg-muted.note: Canonical value per tailwind.config.ts; globals.css's --fg-muted custom property was fixed to match (previously drifted to #737373). Still doesn't clear the WCAG 2.2 AAA 7:1 bar PRODUCT.md now targets (~5.7:1) — flagged as an open issue, see DESIGN.md's 'AAA Gap' rule.

warning.note: Canonical value per tailwind.config.ts; globals.css's .sample-score rules were fixed to reference the new --warning / --warning-dim custom properties instead of hardcoding #fbbf24.

display.purpose: Hero headlines only. The largest type on any page. Assertive presence.

headline.purpose: Section titles. Used sparingly to mark major page divisions.

title.purpose: Card titles, step headings, secondary labels.

body.purpose: Primary prose. Capped at 65–75ch for readability. Set via globals.css's --text-base (17px).

label.purpose: Badges, eyebrows, step numbers. Wide tracking creates small-caps appearance.

shadows.name: button-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover state. Responsive glow, not ambient.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA button (components/ui/Button.tsx, size="md", the default). Used for 'Run Free Audit', 'Review checkout', primary form submits.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 12px 24px; background: #10b981; color: #050505; font-family: Karla, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #34d399; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #10b981; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Primary Button (Large / Hero)
components.description: size="lg" variant for hero CTAs. Today the homepage hero hand-rolls this padding/radius on a raw <Link> instead of using the Button component at this size — that's drift to fix, not a second intended pattern.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary-lg { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 16px 32px; background: #10b981; color: #050505; font-family: Karla, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; border-radius: 16px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary-lg:hover { background: #34d399; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary-lg:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #10b981; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outline variant, size="md". 'View audit status', 'Review checkout' in outline contexts.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 12px 24px; background: transparent; color: #10b981; font-family: Karla, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; border: 1px solid #10b981; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #10b981; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Card Default
components.description: Standard container for content sections (components/ui/Card.tsx). Tonal separation from background.
components.html:
Card Title

Card content goes here with supporting description text.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #111111; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card h3 { font-family: Karla, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card p { font-family: Karla, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; color: #888888; line-height: 1.65; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input for forms (components/ui/Input.tsx). Near-black background with subtle border.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; background: #111111; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); border-radius: 12px; color: #ffffff; font-family: Karla, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; outline: none; transition: border 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #888888; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #10b981; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.2); }

components.name: Badge Label
components.description: Uppercase tracked labels for status, eyebrows, and step numbers.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1); color: #10b981; font-family: Karla, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Before/After Tag
components.description: Case-study proof pattern (DESIGN.md 'Proof Section Components'). Pairs a danger-tinted 'before' tag with an emerald-tinted 'after' tag to show the fix.
components.css: .ds-tag-before { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15); color: #ef4444; font-family: Karla, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-tag-after { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1); color: #10b981; font-family: Karla, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Header navigation links. Muted at rest, emerald on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { color: #888888; font-family: Karla, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; padding: 12px 0; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #10b981; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #10b981; outline-offset: 4px; border-radius: 4px; } @media (pointer: coarse) { .ds-nav-link { min-height: 44px; padding: 16px 12px; } }

narrative.overview:
Assertive authority meets clinical precision. The system projects confidence through density and sharpness — not friendliness, not warmth, not restraint. This is diagnostic equipment, not a lifestyle brand. Karla replaced Inter specifically to exit the reflex-default monoculture. Near-black foundation eliminates visual competition. Signal Emerald marks actionable elements with authority.

Depth emerges from ambient glow orbs that create atmospheric layering, not lift. The interface feels like surfaces emerging from atmosphere, not sitting on top of it. Every visual choice serves the belief ladder — the visitor must believe Nebula finds real, specific defects on their page.

Resolved drift: the indigo/mint palette and dangerouslySetInnerHTML/nested-body anti-pattern that used to span about/** and most of learning-centre/** has been migrated onto these tokens as plain JSX.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black canvas eliminates everything but diagnostic content
Signal Emerald authority on actions — used sparingly (≤10% surface)
Karla grotesque: geometric, weight-capable, assertively non-default
Ambient depth via layered glow, never drop shadows
Tight tracking (-0.03em) on display for condensed authority
Evidence-first: annotated defects trump marketing claims

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Emerald is reserved for actionable elements and positive signal. It appears on ≤10% of any screen surface. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The No-Warm-Neutral Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds live on the cool near-black axis. No cream, sand, paper, parchment. Warmth is carried by emerald accent and imagery.

rules.name: The AAA Gap
rules.body: PRODUCT.md targets WCAG 2.2 AAA (7:1). FG Muted at #888888 measures ~5.7:1 against near-black, and the legacy #737373 measures ~4.3:1 — both AA-level at best. Open issue, not solved: don't treat current muted text as AAA-compliant.

rules.name: The Tracking Floor
rules.body: Display letter-spacing never goes below -0.03em. Tighter risks letter collision at 4rem scale.

rules.name: The No-Drop-Shadow Rule
rules.body: No traditional drop shadows with offset. Use centered glow (0 offset, high blur) or tonal layering instead.

rules.name: The Ambient-Not-Lifted Rule
rules.body: Glow orbs set atmosphere; state changes set interaction. No static glow on interactive elements at rest.

dos: Do use Signal Emerald exclusively for actionable elements and positive signal.
Do maintain Near Black as body background everywhere.
Do use ambient glow orbs for atmospheric depth instead of drop shadows.
Do set display headlines with tight tracking (-0.03em).
Do cap body prose at 65–75ch line length.
Do show evidence — annotated screenshots and specific defects.
Do include skip-link for keyboard navigation. Target WCAG 2.2 AAA.
Do use the shared Button/Card/Input components from components/ui/ instead of re-implementing their styles inline.
donts: Don't use gradient text. Solid Signal Emerald or nothing.
Don't apply side-stripe borders as visual decoration.
Don't use identical card grids repeated endlessly.
Don't add tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.
Don't use drop shadows with large blur (≥16px).
Don't fabricate testimonials or conversion claims.
Don't default to Inter, DM Sans, or reflex-reject fonts.
Don't reintroduce the old indigo/mint palette (#6366f1, #a5b4fc, #79f2c0) — it was migrated off every page.

Don't hardcode a token value directly (a hex, an rgba) when a shared color or utility class already names it — globals.css's fg-muted/warning duplicates were exactly this mistake; both now reference var(--fg-muted)/var(--warning).
